# CS_4 Mechmath


## Project 1: Finite Element Method

This project implements a Finite Element Method (FEM) solution for the following boundary value problem: 

$-(k u')' + 4u = f(x), \quad 0 < x < 1,  \quad u(0) = u(1) = 0,  \quad k(x) = e^{\alpha x}$
